text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After three years of racing in the Twinkle Series,
things have finally settled down. One early
afternoon...

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text:
It's precisely because she's so ordinary that seeing
her win is so motivating!

text_block_list.name: Newscaster
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser's victory in the Arima Kinen
has served as a moment of inspiration for
countless people.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser drops by my office while I'm
watching the news.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hey! Wanna come to my hometown with me?
choice_data_list: Sure, but isn't this is a bit sudden?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, well, my parents and I were just talking
about having a picnic.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Since they're going to be making plenty of food, I
thought you might wanna tag along!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... I'm sure this is where we're suppose to
meet up...

text_block_list.name: Tannhauser's Mother
text_block_list.text: Oh, there she is! Tannhauser!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A couple carrying a multitiered lunch box is
heading our way, waving all the while.

text_block_list.name: Tannhauser's Father
text_block_list.text:
Sorry we're late, but it took a while to prepare
everything. Nice to meet you. I hope Tannhauser
hasn't been giving you too much trouble.

text_block_list.name: Tannhauser's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Ever since she told us she'd be bringing
along someone special, I haven't been able to sit
still.

text_block_list.name: Tannhauser's Mother
text_block_list.text:
We pulled out all the stops with this meal, so I
hope you enjoy it.
choice_data_list:
It's nice to meet you both. And thank you. I
can't wait to try it.

text_block_list.name: Tannhauser's Mother
text_block_list.text: ...I have to say I'm surprised, though!

text_block_list.name: Tannhauser's Mother
text_block_list.text: How did you ever find such an upstanding partner, Tannhauser?! Way to go!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: H-huh?! What, no! This is my trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tannhauser's Mother
text_block_list.text: Your trainer?! Oh... silly me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Misunderstandings resolved, we decide to search
for a good picnic spot.

text_block_list.name: Tannhauser's Father
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to bring some boiled shark fin, but I just
couldn't get the flavor up to snuff. Apologies, but
the sides are all rather ordinary today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser's father lays out each tier of
the lunchbox, and it looks like exactly what you'd
expect from a famous restaurant!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Wooow! Isn't this incredible, Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hamburger steaks, fried shrimp, big rolls of sushi,
simmered vegetables, rolled omelets...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
These are all super popular at our restaurant!
Mom, Dad, thanks a lot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everything is even more incredible than I
imagined. I feel like I'm starting to understand
where her unusually broad definition of "ordinary"
comes from.

text_block_list.name: Tannhauser's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Still, Tannhauser's always had a tendency to trip
up at critical moments.

text_block_list.name: Tannhauser's Mother
text_block_list.text:
One time, she got selected for an interschool
Umamusume relay and worked herself so hard she
ended up with a fever on the day of the race.

text_block_list.name: Tannhauser's Father
text_block_list.text:
One Labor Day, she wanted to cook for us, but
ended up spending all of her allowance making
the practice dishes.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: H-hey! Let's not go digging up the past!

text_block_list.name: Tannhauser's Mother
text_block_list.text:
But... that's exactly why we were so happy when
we watched the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Tannhauser's Mother
text_block_list.text:
You pulled off the win, and everyone in the
stadium was cheering so loudly!

text_block_list.name: Tannhauser's Father
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, we were bawling our eyes out. You did
great, Tannhauser.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh, you two...

text_block_list.name: Tannhauser's Father
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for supporting our daughter and
helping her reach great heights.

text_block_list.name: Tannhauser's Father
text_block_list.text:
She might not be the flashiest girl around, but
she's our little treasure...

text_block_list.name: Tannhauser's Mother
text_block_list.text:
We're just so happy we got to see her shine
brilliantly like that. So many people said that they
look up to her.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: M-mommy... Daddy... Sob!

text_block_list.name: Tannhauser's Mother
text_block_list.text: Eat as much as you like today! Sniff!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The three of them continue eating while tears
stream down their faces. Watching them, I can
feel the deep love that Matikanetannhauser's
parents have for her.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Phew! I'm stuffed! That was delicious.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Still, I never expected I'd be crying so much
today.
choice_data_list: Really? I figured you for a regular crybaby.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
No way! I normally cry an ordinary amount! I just
got really emotional talking about the good old
days...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Anyhoo, that was great! Mom and Dad were sooo
happy for me.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you so much, Trainer.
choice_data_list: You know, it's all thanks to your hard work.
You know, it's all thanks to your hard work.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: No, I couldn't have done any of this alone. Ahaha.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for sticking with me, even though I always
flub it when it counts.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
You're the one who believed in me and taught me
what's important.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
You gave me the strength to keep moving
forward. That's why... Yeah, that's right.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: You've been my star these past three years.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...Just teasing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She says that, but she also looks like she meant it.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
So, uh... I'm probably still going to mess up a
whole lot. I'll probably catch a cold on the day of
a big race or something.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But I can't imagine doing all of this with anyone
else. So...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Will you stay by my side?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I'm so happy...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser bows her head slightly,
looking just a tad more timid than usual.

text_block_list.name: Train Conductor
text_block_list.text: The doors are closing. The next stop is...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Agh! We missed our stop!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, my days alongside the ordinary, slightly
clumsy, yet hardworking Matikanetannhauser are
set to continue.
